title: Moranopteris liesneri
taxonomy: Moranopteris liesneri is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a member of the genus Moranopteris, which is a group of ferns. Moranopteris liesneri is native to Central America and is found in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. The species is classified as an epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants, typically trees. Moranopteris liesneri is often found in humid, tropical environments.
